title: The Blocked List
content:
See, I'm thinking about adding another box on one of the left column called **The Blocked List**. In that box is a _list_ (duh!) of websites I used to visit regularly but have been _blocked_ (duh! x2).

Just to remind myself not to click on the link to those website. --"

The list shouldn't be that long though. I only have 2 sites off the top of my head right now. :P
